name: gradeVITian
tagline: GPA, CGPA, grade & attendance calculators for VIT students
description: A free, mobile-first grading toolkit for VIT students hosted under jayaremala.com. Compute GPA and CGPA, predict your grades, estimate the GPA you still need, and track attendance — fast and accurate. Installable as a PWA, with optional accounts to save calculations and a feedback/social layer. Built as a Next.js frontend on a FastAPI backend (Bearer-token auth, saved results, notifications, SQLite).
